title: majorana × paniculata
intro: Majorana × paniculata, also known as Majorana or Sweet Majoran, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Majorana × paniculata include its ability to aid digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in cooking and medicinal purposes.
